creator: jeh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Works fine here on a fresh install of 4.3-RELEASE.

From the tiny bit of information you provided you don't indicate if
gmake was built and installed or not.  Is /usr/local/bin in your PATH? 
What shell are you using?  Some shells might require `rehash` to find
new binaries.

Jim
